uplink.description: Battery, temperature, humidity, NO2 (TTN example bytes; trailing unrecognized channel 0x07 stops parsing, matching upstream)
All four channels plus CO (synthetic, in-bounds; exercises uint16 CO decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on these bytes and normalizing per this module's vocabulary (battery%->batteryPercent, temp->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, no2/co as extras).

uplink.description: Negative temperature (synthetic, exercises signed LE decode)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on these bytes and normalizing per this module's vocabulary.

uplink.description: Unrecognized leading channel returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic error case. Upstream returns a bare {data:{}} here; this module's output contract forbids bare empty data, so the codec returns an error instead.
